title: API: Wrong definition of docker compatible API in podman swagger
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

I know there has been substantial effort into providing docker compatible API in podman 2.0 but it seems the swagger/OpenAPI definition of those APIs are not updated accordingly.
The only swagger definition of podman I could get my hand on https://storage.googleapis.com/libpod-master-releases/ has many regressions from Docker API even though podman engine itself actually behaves compliant to Docker API.

The list of those incompatibilities is long just some examples to check:

Operations: 
* ExecInspect: response "200" is missing the output schema
* ContainerCreate: is missing input parameters
* ContainerList: input parameters digress from Docker API
* NetworkCreate: resonse value "200" instead of "201 with wrong definition
...

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

Check https://storage.googleapis.com/libpod-master-releases/<any release> against [Docker API](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v3.1/vendor/github.com/docker/docker/api/swagger.yaml)


**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md)**


Yes, `v4.0.0-rc1` have still lots of inconsistencies.

comments.body: Care to open a PR to fix this?

@idleroamer They live in https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/main/pkg/api/server - for example https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/pkg/api/server/register_exec.go#L11-L76 has full swagger for our Docker-compatible Exec endpoint.

Please be aware that only the endpoints marked "compat" (e.g. on line 11 of the snippet I linked) are Docker-compatible, the others are Podman-specific and we do not expect those to conform to the Docker API. Please also be aware that we're presently targeting v1.40 of the Docker API, and whatever changes were in v1.41 haven't landed yet.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
not yet found the time, kind of busy recently. Hopefully in near future.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

@idleroamer I have picked up this issue. 

ContainerCreate appears to have all the options for the compatibility API listed. Were you looking for documentation on the fields?

@idleroamer I see two differences in ContainerList, we support an additional query parameter `external` which need not be used. And the filter `isolation`, is not supported as podman service does not support windows. Did you expect the unsupported filter to be ignored?
@idleroamer Do you have an audit tool you were using or did you find these issues coding against the API?
